title: System settings
description: Manage silent mode, account defaults, traffic, agent, notifications and backups

actions.save_failed: Save failed; please check your input

silent_mode.title: Silent mode
silent_mode.description: Hides the admin entry point behind a 32-character hex prefix; visitors without the prefix see an nginx 404
silent_mode.current_prefix_hint: Only the first/last 4 characters are shown for safety; click rotate to receive the full URL
silent_mode.rotate_confirm_description: A new prefix will be generated and every active session will be revoked. All users — including you — must log in again using the new URL. Make sure you have a way to record the new address before continuing.
silent_mode.rotate_success: Prefix rotated. Copy the URL below — it will not be shown again.
silent_mode.url_only_shown_once: This URL is shown only once; leaving the page hides it forever

account.default_locale_hint: Locale assigned to brand-new users on first login

traffic.monthly_reset_day_hint: 1–28; traffic counters reset at 00:00 on this day

agent.heartbeat_interval_hint: 5–300; shorter intervals produce more frequent updates

notify.debounce_hint: Repeated events within this window are deduplicated; 0 disables debouncing

backup.title: Backup & restore
backup.description: tar.gz archive containing the SQLite snapshot plus a settings JSON dump; restore requires a restart
backup.create_hint: Click to generate a snapshot and download it locally
backup.restore_description: Upload a previously generated tar.gz; restoring overwrites current data and requires a restart
backup.restore_warning: Warning: restoring overwrites the live database and settings! Take a fresh backup first.
backup.restore_confirm_description: The service will restart and current data will be overwritten. Confirm the archive comes from a trusted source.
backup.restore_success: Restore complete; the service will restart shortly
backup.history_empty: No history yet — v1 only supports local downloads
